name: Tiger Plugin
description: Multi-scanner goal-based trading system for Hyperliquid perpetuals

workspace.description: Absolute path to Tiger workspace directory

dslTickInterval.description: DSL trailing stop tick interval in milliseconds (default: 30000)

workspace.label: Tiger Workspace
workspace.help: Must contain scripts/ and state/ subdirectories

pythonPath.label: Python Path
pythonPath.help: Full path to python3 executable (default: python3)

scriptTimeout.label: Script Timeout (ms)
scriptTimeout.help: Maximum execution time per script call (default: 55000)

dslTickInterval.label: DSL Tick Interval (ms)
dslTickInterval.help: How often the DSL trailing stop service runs (default: 30000)
